'''鈭歝h-th-j-r''' ('''kachathjeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twaddle|twaddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twaddle|twaddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-th-j-r
|-
! Lemma
| kachathjeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichathjeroko|thichathjeroko]] || [[word:jichathjeroko|jichathjeroko]] || [[word:shichathjeroko|shichathjeroko]] || [[word:kichathjeroko|kichathjeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
